name: CLOVER HEALTH INVESTMENTS, CORP. /DE
business: Clover Health offers Medicare Advantage plans (PPO and HMO) and a proprietary software platform, Clover Assistant, which provides data-driven clinical insights to physicians. The company also licenses this technology as Counterpart Assistant to external payors and providers serving the Medicare-eligible population. Its wide-network PPO plans aim to provide affordable healthcare with low out-of-pocket costs.

exposures.sentence: Clover Assistant is a purpose-built technology platform that empowers providers to deliver intuitive data-driven, personalized care to help physicians detect, identify, and manage diseases earlier.
We operate Preferred Provider Organization ("PPO") and Health Maintenance Organization ("HMO") Medicare Advantage ("MA") plans for Medicare-eligible individuals.

catalysts.event: MA membership growth to over 153,000 members following Annual Election Period
catalysts.sentence: On January 14, 2026, the Company announced a 53% year-over-year growth of its MA membership during the most recent Annual Election Period.

catalysts.event: CMS Star rating change for PPO and HMO plans
catalysts.sentence: On October 9, 2025, the Company announced that CMS has decreased the Star rating of its PPO Medicare Advantage plans to 3.5 Stars for Star rating year 2026, which will affect payment year 2027.

catalysts.event: Expansion of MA plan availability to 203 counties
catalysts.sentence: At January 1, 2026, we operated our MA plans in five states and 203 counties.

tamClaims.claim: Total Medicare expenditures expected to be approximately $1.5 trillion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 70 million people were enrolled in Medicare in 2025. That number is expected to rise, equating to approximately $1.5 trillion in total expenditures by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: MA market annual spend was approximately $545 billion in 2025, expected to grow to approximately $916 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: Within Medicare, the MA market made up approximately $545 billion of annual spend in 2025 and is expected to grow to approximately $916 billion by 2030.
